title: 🌟 **Syncing monday.com with Google Sheets and other monday.com Accounts! (resynced.io)** 🌟

posts.author: Mykola (Mykola Pustovoychenko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello monday.com Community,

We’re excited to introduce resynced.io, now available on the monday.com marketplace!

What is resynced.io?
resynced.io is a powerful app that simplifies your workflows by enabling two-way data synchronization between:

  • monday.com boards and Google Sheets
  • monday.com boards across different accounts

Why did we build this app?
Having built several apps for monday.com, we noticed a common challenge: many companies need a seamless way to sync data between monday.com and Google Sheets to better communicate with clients and coordinate between departments using different toolsets. resynced.io was created to solve this problem.

What does resynced.io do?

  • Automatically sync data between monday.com boards and Google Sheets.
  • Keep multiple monday.com boards in sync, even if they’re in different accounts.
  • Define the synchronization direction for each field based on your workflow.
  • Ensure data stays updated everywhere in real time, so you never miss a change.

To get started, check out our quick start guide for an easy step-by-step setup.

Example Use Cases and Workflows:

  • Sales Teams: Share real-time updates between Google Sheets and monday.com boards to manage leads and deals efficiently.
  • Project Managers: Collaborate on projects across multiple monday.com accounts while keeping boards synchronized automatically.
  • Marketing Teams: Sync campaign details from Google Sheets to a shared monday.com board for streamlined tracking.

Who are we?
I’m Mykola, representing LeanyLabs, a team of experienced developers focused on building innovative tools for the monday.com ecosystem.

How can you use resynced.io?

  • Visit the resynced.io marketplace listing and install the app.
  • Set up your synchronization in just minutes with our user-friendly interface.
  • For guidance, visit our quick start guide.
  • Have questions or need help? I’m always here to support you.

Are there any dependencies?
No, there are no special subscriptions required—just an active monday.com account.

Does it have a cost?
resynced.io is currently in public beta and available at no cost. We welcome you to try it out and share your feedback with us.

I’m happy to answer any questions or provide a demo of resynced.io. Reach out to me anytime at mykola@resynced.io. Let’s revolutionize your workflows together!
